title: IITG Results 2026 - Key Highlights

detail.title: IITG Results 2026 - Key Highlights
detail.short_info: GATE 2026 result Out updates by IIT Guwahati Check scorecard, cut off marks, topper list, and direct result link. Download your GATE 2026 results here.

content.text: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati has officially declared the GATE 2026 Results. The results belong to the 2026 academic session, and students can check their status online at the IITG exam portal. These results are essential for progression to the next semester and verification of academic performance. Students can access their result by visiting the official IITG website at iitg.ac.in and entering their registration credentials. It is advised to download and save the result PDF for future academic and official reference.

Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati has published the latest GATE 2026 results on its official website for the 2026 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.
The university has activated the direct link for checking GATE 2026 results. Students can instantly view or download their result sheet through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Check IITG Results 2026 Online?

content.text: IITG has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their GATE 2026 application number and password to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official IITG exam portal at iitg.ac.in.
Find the Results Section - Click on the GATE 2026 Results link on the homepage.
Select Your Exam - Choose GATE 2026 from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details - Input your GATE 2026 Application Number and Password in the required fields.
Submit & View - Click the Submit button to view your IITG result 2026 on screen.
Download the Scorecard - Click Download or Print to save your result PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details - Check that your name, application number, and marks are correctly reflected on the scorecard.
